name: research-tools
description: Research skills and MCP servers for PaperRead drafts, paper-library intake, Zotero, public paper search, clean web-page extraction, quality-first local document extraction, and source-backed LLM Wiki maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: PaperRead drafts, paper intake, web, local document, and LLM Wiki tools.
interface.longDescription: Research Tools packages a lightweight PaperRead draft workflow for factual Obsidian note shells, a Zotero-first paper-library intake workflow, paper-search MCP, Zotero MCP, Defuddle web extraction, quality-first local MinerU document extraction, and the Research LLM Wiki workflow for source-backed Obsidian research synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Use $paper-read-draft to create a factual Obsidian PaperRead note shell and leave personal reading sections for me.
Use $paper-library-intake to find, deduplicate, file, or add a paper with verified attachment storage.
Extract a complex local document with checksum-verified MinerU outputs.
Use the Research LLM Wiki to ingest, query, or lint my research vault wiki.
